mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_stats ( stat_date, pv, uv, new_user_count, user_total_count, drama_count, content_count, like_count, comment_count, favorite_count, share_count, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{statDate}, #{pv}, #{uv}, #{newUserCount}, #{userTotalCount}, #{dramaCount}, #{contentCount}, #{likeCount}, #{commentCount}, #{favoriteCount}, #{shareCount}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE pv = #{pv}, uv = #{uv}, new_user_count = #{newUserCount}, user_total_count = #{userTotalCount}, drama_count = #{dramaCount}, content_count = #{contentCount}, like_count = #{likeCount}, comment_count = #{commentCount}, favorite_count = #{favoriteCount}, share_count = #{shareCount}, update_time = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_behavior WHERE DATE(create_time) = #{date}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM login_log WHERE DATE(login_time) = #{date}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE DATE(create_time) = #{date}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_behavior WHERE DATE(create_time) = #{date} AND action = #{action}
